data.name: Crossing the Southern Border: Futa Freedom
data.detailed_description:
Strange things are going on at the US-Mexico border! Will it be the only border you cross?

You are an aspiring legally challenged immigrant trying to cross the border into the US. Unbenounced to you, some changes have happened at the border. Will you adapt and cross some borders of your own? How long can you resist the sweet temptation of Futa Cock?

Or will you forge your own path...

This Comedy Visual Novel focuses on a male MC dicovering getting penetrated and features branching storylines and player choice. Will you experience a shamefull discovery or will you turn into the biggest slut south and north of the border? Maybe you could even manage to hold on to your masculinity... If you really want to...

Due to the nature of your journey, the game follows more of a roadtrip structure than a classic dating-sim. For some strange reason though many of the characters will be recurring. Find out why by uncovering a devious conspiracy set around the southern border!


Futa on male is very inherently part and focus of the story. Enjoy both the slow development towards that stage as well as hardcore action. Long and deep conversations are followed by even longer sex-scenes.

A lot of humor is derived from the mismatch of expectations about classic sexual roles and the women you meet. Be prepared to have your horizon expanded by delicious futa cock!

And some other stuff your ass didn't know it was yearning for...

While not every woman is a Futa, they all want to penetrate you.


The game currently features approximately 4000 unique Renders and 100.000 Words of text. Long story sections alternate with long sex-scenes.

Warning: Lot's of clicking before the first dicking!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo, AMD Phenom II or better
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 8MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 08/10/11
  • 處理器: Pentium 4 1.5GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 16MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6+
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 256 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
